problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: Combining Bose-Einstein condensate at higher temperature with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
